title: How to Create a Client Pitch With AI — From Prompt to PDF in 15 Minutes
summary: A tutorial showing how to create a professional one-page marketing pitch document from a single text prompt using Venngage AI. The workflow covers content generation, design customization, image selection, and PDF export within 15 minutes.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master demonstrates building a professional one-page marketing pitch document from a single text prompt using Venngage AI. The workflow runs end to end in about 15 minutes: content generation from the prompt, design customization, image selection, and PDF export. It shows how a generative design tool compresses the steps from initial text input to a finished, shareable client deliverable.
